# Feature: Test Lab Pane Actions

## 1. Feature Goal

**ID**: FEAT-003  
**Source Plan**: `.spec-lite/plan_pane_actions.md`

Update the Test Lab pane so destructive deletion is protected by an explicit confirmation dialog and the per-row hover run shortcut is removed, while preserving existing rename behavior and adapter-driven persistence.

This feature improves action consistency with the pane-actions plan by reducing accidental deletions and removing an interaction that is no longer part of the standardized Test Lab row controls.

---

## 2. Data Model (Granular)

`.spec-lite/data_model.md` does not exist. This feature uses existing persisted Test Suite models and introduces no new persisted entities.

### Entities & Attributes

- **`TestSuite`** (existing persisted model)
  - `id` (string) - stable suite identifier used for selection, rename, and delete.
  - `name` (string) - suite display name (already managed with uniqueness checks).
  - `items` (`TestItem[]`) - suite contents used for metadata display.
  - `updatedAt` (ISO string) - metadata displayed in pane rows.

- **`TestSuitesSlice`** (existing Zustand slice state)
  - `testSuites` (`TestSuite[]`) - source list rendered in `TestLabPane`.
  - `testSuiteRunStates` (`Record<string, TestSuiteRunState>`) - controls per-suite `Running...` indicator.
  - `removeTestSuite(id)` - removes suite and related dirty/run-state tracking after successful adapter delete.
  - `isTestSuiteNameUnique(name, excludeId?)` - existing rename uniqueness guard (case-insensitive, trimmed).

- **`TestLabPane` local UI state** (existing + reused)
  - `editingSuiteId` (`string | null`) - active inline rename row.
  - `editingName` (string) - inline rename draft.
  - `searchText` (string) - client-side filter input.

- **`useConfirmDialog` state** (existing shared hook)
  - `isOpen` (boolean) - whether destructive confirm modal is visible.
  - `isConfirming` (boolean) - async confirm progress state.
  - `options` (`ConfirmDialogOptions | null`) - title/message/onConfirm callback for the active delete target.

### Relationships

- `TestSuitesSlice.testSuites` 1:N `TestSuite` rows rendered in `TestLabPane`.
- `testSuiteRunStates` maps by `TestSuite.id` to run-state metadata used by row actions.
- Confirm dialog target references exactly one `TestSuite` by `id` + `name` for a delete attempt.

### Indexes & Constraints

- Test suite names must remain unique case-insensitively (`isTestSuiteNameUnique`) for rename flow; FEAT-003 does not change this rule.
- Deletion must only mutate store after adapter success (`Result.isOk === true`).
- Delete action now requires explicit user confirmation before calling `storageAdapter.deleteTestSuite`.

---

## 3. Files

List of files this feature is expected to create or modify:

- `packages/core/src/components/common/TestLabPane.tsx` - remove hover run shortcut and add delete-confirmation flow using the shared confirm dialog hook.
- `packages/core/src/test/components/common/TestLabPane.test.tsx` - new component tests for FEAT-003 behavior (no run shortcut + confirmed delete lifecycle).

---

## 4. Dependencies

- **FEAT-001**: Shared confirmation dialog hook (`useConfirmDialog`) must be available and used for destructive actions.
- Existing storage adapter contract: `deleteTestSuite(suiteId)` returning `Result<void, string>`.
- Existing store actions: `removeTestSuite`, `setCurrentEditingTestSuiteId`, `isTestSuiteNameUnique`.

---

## 5. Implementation Tasks

### TASK-001: Add delete confirmation flow for Test Suite deletion

- [ ] **Implementation**: Update `TestLabPane.tsx` to use `useConfirmDialog`. Replace direct `handleDeleteTestSuite(...)` menu invocation with `openConfirmDialog(...)` and wire delete logic into the confirm callback. Keep adapter-first behavior: call `storageAdapter.deleteTestSuite`, then call `removeTestSuite` only on success; surface adapter errors with `notification.showNotification('error', message)`.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: In `TestLabPane.test.tsx`, verify: (1) clicking Delete opens confirmation dialog with destructive messaging, (2) cancelling does not call adapter delete, (3) confirming calls adapter delete and removes the suite from rendered rows/store-backed output, (4) adapter error path shows an error notification and does not remove the suite.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Add/update JSDoc and inline comments in `TestLabPane.tsx` describing the confirm-before-delete lifecycle and why store mutation is gated on adapter success.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/core test -- TestLabPane` and manually confirm Delete now requires explicit confirmation.

### TASK-002: Remove the Test Lab hover run shortcut action from suite rows

- [ ] **Implementation**: In `TestLabPane.tsx`, remove the hover `PlayIcon` run button block from row actions while preserving row selection behavior, rename/delete dropdown actions, and existing `Running...` status text for active suites.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: In `TestLabPane.test.tsx`, verify: (1) no per-row run shortcut button is rendered, (2) dropdown still renders Rename and Delete actions, (3) existing running-state label remains visible when `testSuiteRunStates[suiteId].isRunning` is true.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Update component-level comments or prop docs to reflect that quick-run is no longer exposed in Test Lab row hover actions.
- **Verify**: Render the pane with populated suites and confirm only rename/delete action controls remain on hover.
- **Depends on**: TASK-001.

### TASK-003: Add focused FEAT-003 regression coverage for Test Lab pane actions

- [ ] **Implementation**: Create `packages/core/src/test/components/common/TestLabPane.test.tsx` with `AdapterProvider` + `createMockAdapter` setup, lightweight UI primitive mocks, and Zustand state seeding to test row action behavior deterministically.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Cover FEAT-003 acceptance criteria end-to-end: delete confirm lifecycle, non-destructive cancel, successful delete persistence/store update, failed delete error handling, and absence of hover run action.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Add file-level test docblock summarizing FEAT-003 scope and what regressions the suite protects against.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/core test -- TestLabPane` and ensure all FEAT-003 tests pass consistently.
- **Depends on**: TASK-002.

---

## 6. Cross-Cutting Concerns

- **Auth**: N/A.
- **Error Handling**: Keep Result-pattern handling for delete calls. Do not optimistically remove suites before adapter success. Show user-facing error notifications for failed delete operations.
- **Logging**: No new logging paths required for FEAT-003; rely on existing adapter/service error logging conventions.

---

- [x] TASK-002: Remove the Test Lab hover run shortcut action from suite rows
